privileged_info_summary: The task uses a synthetic Maven project (MediLogExport version 1.0-SNAPSHOT) with Java 17 and JUnit 5.9.2. The core method buildObservationSegment() initially uses inefficient String concatenation (result += ) inside a loop to build HL7 OBX segments. The HL7 format is: OBX|SetID|ValueType|Identifier||Value|Units||||Status, with carriage return (\r) as line terminator. Two JUnit tests exist: (1) testBuildObservationSegment tests 3 observations (Heart Rate and Body Temp as NM type, Symptoms as ST type) expecting exact output with \r terminators; (2) testEmptyList expects empty string for empty input. The refactoring must replace += with StringBuilder/StringBuffer while preserving exact output format. Observation class has 6 fields: id (int), type/identifier/value/units/status (String).
